name: Zacapa Resources Ltd.
description: Zacapa Resources Ltd. is a Canada-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of high-potential copper and gold projects. The company maintains a strategic portfolio of porphyry copper and epithermal gold assets located in prolific mining jurisdictions across the United States, including Nevada, Arizona, and Idaho. Zacapa Resources is dedicated to identifying and advancing drill-ready targets that demonstrate Tier 1 discovery potential, leveraging its technical expertise to unlock value within these world-class geological belts. The company is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol ZACA.
